## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences. What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New scraper or feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behavior changes)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally — at least one search runs end-to-end
- [ ] **README.md updated** if user-visible behavior, skills, flags, install flow, or data location changed
- [ ] Affected skill `SKILL.md` updated if prompts, run flow, or summary rendering changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new dependencies, or dependencies are justified in the PR description
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII added to the repo
